replies.msg: San José, June 17 (elmundo.cr) - National technician Óscar Ramírez, decided to make a variant in his initial training with respect to what he has been using previously. He will leave in the bench of substitutes to the left side Bryan Oviedo to introduce Francisco Calvo into his formation. The reasons are simple. Ramirez is very concerned about the aerial game of Serbia, and has decided to reinforce that aspect with Calvo, both defensive and offensive, leaving behind the arrival that Oviedo could give him by the left wing and reinforcing the defense.
